data.reasoningText:
The user is asking for guidance on how to implement saving draft text when a .NET MAUI app goes to the background and restoring it when it comes back to the foreground. This is a common pattern in mobile development.

Let me provide a concise, practical example showing how to do this properly in .NET MAUI using the app lifecycle events and Preferences API.
